title: zornia zollingeri
intro: Zornia zollingeri is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the Mexican firecracker or firecracker weed. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Zornia zollingeri is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its potential health benefits.
